title: Conducts Weird Science
summary: Your preternatural insight and ability make you a scientist capable of amazing feats.
tiers: Tier 3: Better Living Through Chemistry or Incredible Health
gm_intrusions: Creations get out of control. Side effects cannot always be predicted. Weird science terrifies people and can draw the media. When a device created or modified by weird science is depleted, it detonates.
text: Your preternatural insight and ability make you a scientist capable of amazing feats.
details: Your preternatural insight and ability make you a scientist capable of amazing feats.
